title: Utility Stocks' Q3 Earnings to Watch on Nov 1: EIX, CNP, WEC
text: Total Q3 earnings of Utility stocks are expected to decline 9.3% year over year, while revenues are likely to improve 3%. EIX, CNP & WEC are set to post Q3 earnings on Nov 1

title: What's in Store for CenterPoint Energy (CNP) in Q3 Earnings?
text: CenterPoint Energy's (CNP) Q3 results are likely to reflect the benefits of warmer weather patterns as well as rate recovery. Yet, storm restoration costs might have hurt earnings.

title: After Plunging 19.3% in 4 Weeks, Here's Why the Trend Might Reverse for CenterPoint (CNP)
text: The heavy selling pressure might have exhausted for CenterPoint (CNP) as it is technically in oversold territory now. In addition to this technical measure, strong agreement among Wall Street analysts in revising earnings estimates higher indicates that the stock is ripe for a trend reversal.

title: AVA vs. CNP: Which Stock Is the Better Value Option?
text: AVA vs. CNP: Which Stock Is the Better Value Option?
